github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Always write the test before the implementation (TDD). Use Arrange-Act-Assert structure. Target 80%+ coverage on new code. Test names must describe the behavior under test, not just the function name. For .NET tests use SQLite in-memory (per AGENTS.md), never EF InMemory provider. For React tests use Vitest + React Testing Library, motion/react Proxy mock, and userEvent (not fireEvent).

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Review across four dimensions: (1) Security CRITICAL — hardcoded secrets, missing input validation, injection, missing server-side authz, sensitive data in logs/errors. (2) Code Quality HIGH — in-place mutation, functions >50 lines, files >800 lines, nesting >4, duplicated logic. (3) Error Handling HIGH — swallowed catches, missing async error handling, leaking internals to users. (4) Test Coverage MEDIUM — missing edge/error cases, always-passing assertions. Output [CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW] with file:line, issue, fix. Block ship on any CRITICAL.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use conventional commit format: <type>(<scope>): <description>. Types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore, perf, ci. Subject line under 72 chars. Focus on WHY the change was made, not WHAT changed. Example: feat(admin): add granular permission for paper publish.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: Include: summary of change, motivation, test plan, screenshots if UI, breaking-change callouts, and a checklist confirming AGENTS.md mission-critical invariants (scoring, AI gateway, content upload, etc.) were not violated.
